74.reason: [The function `panduan` does not handle all cases; it returns undefined value when neither condition is met, leading to undefined behavior. Also, logic for operator precedence is flawed: it should return 1 when the second operator has higher precedence than the first, but current logic returns 0 for `a` being * or / regardless of `b`, which breaks correct left-to-right evaluation for same-precedence operators.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 1.0 , reason:  [The function `panduan` does not handle all cases; it returns undefined value when neither condition is met, leading to undefined behavior. Also, logic for operator precedence is flawed: it should return 1 when the second operator has higher precedence than the first, but current logic returns 0 for `a` being * or / regardless of `b`, which breaks correct left-to-right evaluation for same-precedence operators.]
